title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bajaj Auto

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bajaj Auto
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Bajaj Auto in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Auto:
Bajaj Auto is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
